body:
**CAS GPA weights (effective Fall 2018+ per University Senate vote, March 29, 2018):**

From the CAS bulletin (§Grades):

*"By vote of the University Senate on March 29, 2018, the weights assigned in computing the grade point average are as follows, effective fall 2018 and thereafter."*

| Grade | Grade Points |
|---|---|
| A | 4.000 |
| A- | 3.667 |
| B+ | 3.333 |
| B | 3.000 |
| B- | 2.667 |
| C+ | 2.333 |
| C | 2.000 |
| C- | 1.667 |
| D+ | 1.333 |
| D | 1.000 |
| F | 0.000 |

*"Only grades of A through F (including all plus and minus grades, such as B+ and B-) earned in any New York University course are computed in the average."*

Non-GPA grades:
- **P** (Pass under P/F): not computed in the average — see the cas_pf_career_cap template for P/F rules.
- **W** (withdrew in good standing): not computed in the average — see cas_withdrawal.
- **NR / R**: administrative grades, not computed.
- **I** (incomplete): not computed until resolved.

Grades earned BEFORE Fall 2018 use the pre-2018 scale; consult an archived CAS bulletin if you need that mapping.
